cc:Work.dc:title: PSU A1 author-compatible clipped-hybrid audit
cc:Work.dc:description: Four-panel deterministic audit of path clipping and mask-conditioned effects across PSU BOST views

g.text: A1 is an author-compatibility clipping ablation that preserves the author's double-cone primitive and cone-miss-to-box fallback; it is not a fixed-domain or reconstruction result.

text.style: font-size: 8px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; fill: #5f6368

g.text: Gray bands mark views with nonzero changes. Deterministic ray census; no statistical error bars.
